description_long: This is a modern, compact sofa with a clean-lined silhouette, upholstered in a light blue or gray fabric. The sofa features a single, uniform seat cushion and a matching backrest cushion, both appearing to be attached and well-padded for comfort. The armrests are present on both sides, straight and at the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a boxy, contemporary look. The legs are short and barely visible, suggesting a low-profile design, possibly with block or recessed supports. A small accent pillow in a contrasting color and a nearby floor lamp are visible, indicating a cozy, inviting setup. The upholstery appears smooth and solid-colored, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
description: A compact, modern sofa with straight armrests, light blue or gray upholstery, and a single seat and back cushion. The design is clean-lined and low-profile, with a smooth, solid fabric finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's straight armrest and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the sofa, the attached cushions, and a small accent pillow on one side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the floor lamp visible, showing the armrest and the sofa's depth.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the backrest's height and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, uniform seat and back cushions, both attached and spanning the full width; one small accent pillow on one side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a squared profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are short, block-style or recessed, barely visible from most angles, likely made of wood or metal for support.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with an attached cushion, matching the seat in width and style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid-colored, smooth fabric with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
